zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Coucy於大約1175年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，她的父親Raoul Ier de Coucy42歲，母親Alix de Dreux20歲。她於大約1200年與Gilles I de Beaumetz結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1214年享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Coucy于大约1175年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，她的父亲Raoul Ier de Coucy42岁，母亲Alix de Dreux20岁。她于大约1200年与Gilles I de Beaumetz结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1214年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Coucy was born about 1175, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Raoul Ier de Coucy, was 42 and her mother, Alix de Dreux, was 20. She married Gilles I de Beaumetz about 1200. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1214, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Coucy est née environ 1175, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Raoul Ier de Coucy, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Gilles I de Beaumetz environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1214, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Coucy um 1175 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul Ier de Coucy 42 und ihre Mutter Alix de Dreux 20. Sie hat um 1200 Gilles I de Beaumetz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1214 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Coucy è nata il circa 1175 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Raoul Ier de Coucy, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Gilles I de Beaumetz circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1214, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Coucyが約1175年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Raoul Ier de Coucyは42歳，母Alix de Dreuxは20歳であった。約1200年にGilles I de Beaumetzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1214年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Coucy(이)가 대략 1175년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul Ier de Coucy(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 Gilles I de Beaumetz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1214년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.environ 1175–about 1214: tany ho any amin'ny 1175–tany ho any amin'ny 1214

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Coucy nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilles I de Beaumetz aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1214, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Coucy родилась около 1175 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul Ier de Coucy было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilles I de Beaumetz около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1214 г. в возрасте 41 год.

sm.environ 1175–about 1214: e tusa o le 1175–e tusa o le 1214

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Coucy nació aproximadamente 1175, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gilles I de Beaumetz aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1214, a la edad de 41 años.
